steps.title: Use the range clue
steps.content: The passage says Chicago has everything from monumental sculptures to innovative street art. That range explains why the city's public art can satisfy any art lover, so the blank needs a word for variety or scope.

steps.title: Reject negative meanings
steps.content: Choice B introduces conflict, which the positive description does not support. Choice C suggests uncertainty or disorder. Choice D means indifference, the opposite of art lovers being satisfied by the collection. The answer is A.
